title: Putham Puthu Malare Song Lyrics Amaravathi
stanzas:
Putham pudhu malare
en aasai sollavaa..
pothi vaithu maraithaen
en baashai sollavaa

sella kili ennai
kulippikka vendum.
selai thalaipin
thuvattida vendum

kalluch silai pola
nee nirkka vendum
kangal paarthu
thalai vaara vendum

nee vandhu ilai
poda vendum.
naan vandhu
parimaara vendum

en imai un vizhi
mooda vendum
iruvarum oru swaram
paada vendum

kanni undhan madi
saaya vendum
kamban varigal
nee solla vendum

unnai katti kondu
thoonga vendum
undhan  viral
thalai kodhida vendum

udhattukkum udhattukkum
dhooram vendum
uyirukkul uyir sendru
saera vendum

Putham pudhu malare
en aasai sollavaa..
pothi vaithu maraithaen
en baashai sollavaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Putham Puthu Malare?

The song expresses the feelings of love and desire, conveying a sense of longing and emotional connection.

What is the plot context of Amaravathi related to this song?

This song plays a significant role in the movie, highlighting the romantic moments between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary SPB and composed by Bala Bharathi.

When was Putham Puthu Malare released?

The song was released on May 28, 1993.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Putham Puthu Malare, the protagonist expresses his innermost feelings of love and yearning, beautifully captured through SPB's enchanting vocals. The song serves as a pivotal moment in Amaravathi, where the emotions of the characters come to life. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. This classic piece remains a favorite for lovers and is perfect for intimate occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Putham Puthu Malare from Amaravathi is a timeless romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the legendary SPB's soulful voice and Vairamuthu's poignant lyrics, this song evokes deep emotions that resonate with listeners. Experience the magic of this classic as it beautifully intertwines melody and heartfelt expression.
stanzaMeanings: Will you tell my wishes, new fresh flower?
Will you tell my wishes, new fresh flower? I have hidden my words in a book.
I open my heart and listen, what will you give me?
I have been thinking about something in my heart, every day I nurture dreams and let them go..
Will you tell my wishes, new fresh flower?
The talking bird needs to sing to me. The leader's voice needs to be heard.
You should stand like a stone statue, looking at me and bowing your head.
You should come and leave the leaves. I should come and make a mark.
My joy should close your eyes, both of us should sing one voice.
You should seek me in you.
Will you tell my wishes, new fresh flower?
The virgin should shade under your roof, you should say Kamban's words.
I should sleep holding you, your fingers should give me a head.
I should see the beauty with my hands. I should feel the coolness in tears.
There should be distance for the heights, life should merge into life.
You should change to become a mother.
Will you tell my wishes, new fresh flower? I have hidden my words in a book.
I open my heart and listen, what will you give me?
I have been thinking about something in my heart, every day I nurture dreams and let them go..
